title: Iran’s De Facto Leader Says Iran Will Not Surrender or Stop Its Attacks
summary_full: Ali Larijani, the head of Iran’s Supreme National Security Council and a close confidant of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, said Iran was determined to avenge the killing of the leader.
summary_public: Ali Larijani, the head of Iran’s Supreme National Security Council and a close confidant of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, said Iran was determined to avenge the killing of the leader.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran Will Not Surrender or Stop Its Attacks
